spec.name: Shockfield
spec.summary: A spell that counters effects using electric magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that counters effects using electric magic. A square counter/affect recipe that channels electric discipline into shock output. It applies a field pattern against object across self reach with immediate persistence.
